ASSISTANT_ADAPTERS.md.reason: Filled tool-surface rows with real verification evidence for this repo (Cursor active and verified; Codex, Copilot, and Claude Code not active).

COUNCIL.md.reason: Records real council sessions for this repo, starting with the 2026-07-02 world-class hardening session.

DESIGN.md.reason: Adapted to this repo's real surfaces (terminal output, markdown, studio HTML export) with completed critique gate, benchmark, and scorecard evidence.

MESSAGING.md.reason: Filled with the kit's real positioning, proof, objections, voice, and copy inventory.

DEPLOYMENT.md.reason: Rewritten for npm-package release flow (CI, Trusted Publishing, SBOM, rollback) instead of the downstream web-app deployment template.

SPEC.md.reason: This repo is the kit's own source; SPEC.md documents the package and CLI contract rather than a downstream app spec.

DECISIONS.md.reason: Package-level ADR history predates the self-install and must be preserved as-is.

DOCS.md.reason: Package-level developer documentation (architecture, install, studio) replaces the downstream template.

STYLE_GUIDE.md.reason: Package-level style guide extended with this repo's terminal-surface design tokens and states instead of the downstream web-app template.

SECURITY.md.reason: Package-level security policy (vulnerability reporting, supply chain) replaces the downstream app security template.

UPGRADE.md.reason: Package-level upgrade guide covers maintainer releases plus downstream upgrade flow; customized with real upgrade history.
